title: maurandya glabrata
intro: Maurandya glabrata, also known as smooth bugle, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Maurandya glabrata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Maurandya glabrata can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
